name: abandoned
notes: Two abandonments, on opposite sides of the whistle, because they must end differently. F1 is abandoned in the FIRST half (floodlight failure) before half time is ever reached: no pack, no push, row cancelled. F2 is abandoned in the SECOND half, after the pack has already been released: the pack STAYS UP. Its ten questions were all set before kick-off, so nothing in it stopped being true when the match was called off. The watchdog is run once at minute 180 — after the second abandonment — to prove it does not reach back and cancel a pack that is already live.
